description: A lead introduction paragraph displayed at the top of page content to summarise the page's subject.

notes: Always a p element. May sometimes contain inline HTML (e.g. br tags). The selectors p.leadintro and .block-field-blocknodestudent-profilefield-stup-intro .leadintro are all variants of the same element and are covered by this component.
